title: Bajaj Electricals is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Bajaj Electricals is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Bajaj Electricals are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Bajaj Electricals:
Bajaj Electricals is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Electricals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
